papers.title: Engineering nanoparticle surface chemistry for antigen-presenting cell targeting improves specificity and safety of TLR3 agonist cancer immunotherapy
papers.translated_title: 通过工程化纳米颗粒表面化学以靶向抗原呈递细胞，可提高TLR3激动剂癌症免疫疗法的特异性和安全性。
papers.author: Gomerdinger, V. F.
papers.summary: Innate immune agonists are promising therapeutic agents to induce immune responses against cancer. However, these agents have been limited by toxicity associated with systemic accumulation and activity in off-target cells. In this work, a targeted nanoparticle (NP) platform to encapsulate and protect the Toll-like receptor 3 (TLR3) agonist polyinosinic-polycytidylic acid (poly(I:C)) and promote its specific delivery to antigen presenting cells (APCs), macrophages and dendritic cells, for activation of this cell population was designed. To determine NP physiochemical properties that promote APC delivery, we developed a library of NP surface chemistries formed by electrostatic adsorption of polyanion coatings onto liposomes using layer-by-layer (LbL) assembly and screened the particles on APCs and off-target cells. Dextran sulfate was identified as a promising coating to enhance specific APC delivery. We applied these design parameters to develop a poly(I:C)-loaded NP for an APC-targeted immunotherapy. In a model of metastatic ovarian cancer, the LbL NP prolonged poly(I:C) retention in the peritoneal space, with 2-fold remaining 24-48hr after administration compared to free poly(I:C), ultimately reducing systemic accumulation and associated toxicities. Compared to free drug, the NP reduced the increase in serum levels of TNF, IL-6, and CXCL10 by 9-, 4-, and 31-fold respectively. NP-treated mice experienced lower weight loss and recovered more quickly at a higher poly(I:C) dose, indicating a widening of the therapeutic window. The NP formulation enhanced accumulation of poly(I:C) in the tumor 2-fold and activation of the target APC population compared to free drug, and ultimately slowed tumor growth and extended survival in combination with doxorubicin chemotherapy. Overall, this work demonstrates a modular NP delivery strategy to improve the delivery, safety, and therapeutic window of a TLR3 agonist.
papers.translated_summary: 先天免疫激动剂是诱导机体产生抗肿瘤免疫应答的潜在治疗药物。然而，这类药物因全身性蓄积和脱靶细胞活性引发的毒性而受到限制。本研究设计了一种靶向纳米颗粒平台，用于包裹并保护Toll样受体3激动剂聚肌胞苷酸，促进其特异性递送至抗原呈递细胞（巨噬细胞和树突状细胞），从而激活该细胞群。为确定促进APC递送的纳米颗粒理化特性，我们通过层层自组装技术将聚阴离子涂层静电吸附到脂质体上，构建了纳米颗粒表面化学库，并在APC和脱靶细胞中筛选颗粒。研究发现硫酸葡聚糖是增强APC特异性递送的有效涂层。基于这些设计参数，我们开发了负载poly(I:C)的纳米颗粒用于APC靶向免疫治疗。在转移性卵巢癌模型中，LbL纳米颗粒延长了poly(I:C)在腹腔内的滞留时间，给药后24-48小时残留量是游离药物的2倍，最终减少了全身蓄积及相关毒性。与游离药物相比，纳米颗粒使血清TNF、IL-6和CXCL10水平分别降低9倍、4倍和31倍。接受纳米颗粒治疗的小鼠体重减轻更少，且在高剂量poly(I:C)下恢复更快，表明治疗窗口扩大。与游离药物相比，纳米制剂使poly(I:C)在肿瘤中的蓄积增加2倍，并增强了靶向APC群的激活，最终在与阿霉素化疗联用时延缓肿瘤生长并延长生存期。总体而言，本研究展示了模块化纳米颗粒递送策略在改善TLR3激动剂递送效率、安全性和治疗窗口方面的应用潜力。

papers.title: The "osteostat": a theory of bone mechanosensing and setpoint adaptation based on osteocytes
papers.translated_title: “骨稳态器”：基于骨细胞的骨力学感知与设定点适应理论
papers.author: Pauchard, Y.
papers.summary: The osteocyte network in bone is believed to play an important role for how bone tissues sense and respond to mechanical stimulation. Yet, bone adaptation to mechanical loads is often conceptualised as a simple response to mechanical stimuli, such as Wolff's law, which is based on mechanical variables only and takes no account of the cellular basis of mechanosensation. Wolff's law presumes the existence of a reference mechanical stimulus, the mechanical setpoint, above which bone is consolidated, and under which bone is removed. In this paper, we develop a theory of bone tissue sensing and adaptation based on osteocytes to provide new understanding of the role played by osteocyte signals in mechanical adaptation. In this theory, the mechanical setpoint of Frost's mechanostat is explicitly embodied as osteocyte properties involved in mechanotransduction. The mechanical setpoint is allowed to adapt due to the replacement of osteocytes during remodelling, making the setpoint space and time dependent. We propose a mathematical model to implement this new theory of bone adapation and present numerical simulations of this model to explore how mechanobiological response curves (effective Wolff's laws) are modulated by setpoint adaptation during remodelling. By accounting for varying osteocyte populations within bone tissue, we explore bone adaptation under osteocyte disruptions, which is particularly relevant to age-related bone loss. Our model suggests that biological disruptions of remodelling balance cannot always be compensated by mechanical feedback, and that setpoint adaptation during remodelling may have significant observable consequences, such as hysteresis in bone response signatures that resemble lazy zones.
papers.translated_summary: 骨组织中的骨细胞网络被认为在骨组织感知和响应机械刺激中发挥重要作用。然而，骨组织对机械负荷的适应常被简化为对机械刺激的简单响应，例如沃尔夫定律，该定律仅基于力学变量，未考虑机械感觉的细胞基础。沃尔夫定律假设存在一个参考机械刺激（即力学设定点），高于此设定点时骨组织会增强，低于此设定点时骨组织会被吸收。本文基于骨细胞提出了一种骨组织感知与适应理论，以深入理解骨细胞信号在机械适应中的作用。在该理论中，弗罗斯特力学稳态模型的力学设定点被明确体现为参与机械转导的骨细胞特性。由于重塑过程中骨细胞的更新，力学设定点可发生适应，使其具有时空依赖性。我们提出一个数学模型来实施这一新的骨适应理论，并通过数值模拟探索重塑过程中设定点适应如何调节力学生物学响应曲线（有效沃尔夫定律）。通过考虑骨组织中骨细胞群体的变化，我们研究了骨细胞功能紊乱下的骨适应，这与年龄相关的骨丢失尤为相关。我们的模型表明，重塑平衡的生物学紊乱无法总是通过机械反馈得到补偿，且重塑过程中的设定点适应可能产生显著的可观测后果，例如类似惰性区的骨响应特征中的滞后现象。

papers.title: Ergothioneine, alone or combined with vitamin K2, vitamin D3 and magnesium L-threonate, attenuates bone turnover, inflammatory and oxidative disturbances in ovariectomized mice
papers.translated_title: 麦角硫因单独或与维生素K2、维生素D3及L-苏糖酸镁联合使用，可减轻卵巢切除小鼠的骨转换、炎症及氧化紊乱。
papers.author: Liu, W.
papers.summary: Purpose: Estrogen deficiency drives bone loss through a complex interplay of endocrine, oxidative, inflammatory, and bone-remodeling disturbances. Ergothioneine (EGT) is a diet-derived thiol/thione antioxidant, yet its effects on the estrogen-deficient skeleton remain unknown. This study evaluated whether EGT-alone or combined with vitamin K2, vitamin D3, and magnesium L-threonate-attenuates the skeletal and systemic consequences of ovariectomy (OVX) in mice. Methods: Forty-eight female C57BL/6J mice underwent either sham surgery or OVX. For 12 weeks, the mice received a daily oral gavage of one of the following: vehicle, alendronate (1.53 mg/kg), EGT (30 mg/kg/day), EGT with vitamin K2 (40 g/kg/day) and vitamin D3 (500 IU/kg/day), or EGT with vitamin K2, magnesium L-threonate (350 mg/kg/day), and vitamin D3 (n = 5-6 per group). Outcomes evaluated included the uterine index, tibial micro-computed tomography (micro-CT), distal-femoral histology, serum bone turnover markers (CTX-I, PINP, osteocalcin), sex hormones, TNF-;, IL-6, SOD, and MDA. Results: OVX significantly lowered the uterine index and induced tibial trabecular deterioration. This was accompanied by increased CTX-I, TNF-;, IL-6, and MDA, alongside decreased PINP, osteocalcin, and SOD (all P < 0.01 vs. sham). Alendronate successfully restored tibial micro-CT bone-volume fraction (BV/TV) and trabecular number (P < 0.01 vs. OVX). While the EGT-based regimens did not significantly restore tibial micro-CT BV/TV, trabecular thickness, or trabecular number (all P > 0.05 vs. OVX), they significantly increased the trabecular area in distal-femoral histology (14.2-15.0% across regimens vs. 7.6% in OVX; P < 0.05). Furthermore, EGT treatments lowered CTX-I, TNF-;, IL-6, and MDA, increased SOD, and partially restored PINP and osteocalcin (P < 0.05 -0.01 vs. OVX). Apparent increases in serum estradiol were assay-dependent and are considered exploratory. Conclusion: EGT-based nutritional regimens improved the systemic oxidative, inflammatory, and bone -turnover environments associated with estrogen-deficient bone loss and successfully preserved the distal-femoral trabecular area. However, tibial three -dimensional microarchitecture was not restored on micro -CT. Given that histological and micro -CT endpoints were evaluated at different skeletal sites, structural interpretations should be made with caution. These findings support the further evaluation of EGT as a dietary adjunct, warranting subsequent mechanistic and dose-optimization studies.
papers.translated_summary: 目的：雌激素缺乏通过内分泌、氧化、炎症和骨重塑紊乱的复杂相互作用导致骨丢失。麦角硫因（EGT）是一种源自饮食的硫醇/硫酮抗氧化剂，但其对雌激素缺乏骨骼的影响尚不清楚。本研究评估了EGT单独或与维生素K2、维生素D3和L-苏糖酸镁联合使用是否能减轻小鼠卵巢切除术（OVX）引起的骨骼和全身后果。方法：48只雌性C57BL/6J小鼠接受假手术或OVX。在12周内，小鼠每天口服灌胃以下之一：载体、阿仑膦酸钠（1.53 mg/kg）、EGT（30 mg/kg/天）、EGT联合维生素K2（40 μg/kg/天）和维生素D3（500 IU/kg/天），或EGT联合维生素K2、L-苏糖酸镁（350 mg/kg/天）和维生素D3（每组5-6只）。评估指标包括子宫指数、胫骨显微计算机断层扫描（micro-CT）、股骨远端组织学、血清骨转换标志物（CTX-I、PINP、骨钙素）、性激素、TNF-α、IL-6、SOD和MDA。结果：OVX显著降低子宫指数并诱导胫骨小梁退化，同时伴随CTX-I、TNF-α、IL-6和MDA升高，以及PINP、骨钙素和SOD降低（均P < 0.01 vs. 假手术组）。阿仑膦酸钠成功恢复胫骨micro-CT骨体积分数（BV/TV）和小梁数量（P < 0.01 vs. OVX）。虽然基于EGT的方案未能显著恢复胫骨micro-CT的BV/TV、小梁厚度或小梁数量（均P > 0.05 vs. OVX），但它们显著增加了股骨远端组织学中的小梁面积（各方案为14.2-15.0%，OVX为7.6%；P < 0.05）。此外，EGT治疗降低了CTX-I、TNF-α、IL-6和MDA，增加了SOD，并部分恢复了PINP和骨钙素（P < 0.05-0.01 vs. OVX）。血清雌二醇的明显增加依赖于检测方法，被视为探索性结果。结论：基于EGT的营养方案改善了与雌激素缺乏骨丢失相关的全身氧化、炎症和骨转换环境，并成功保留了股骨远端小梁面积。然而，胫骨三维微结构在micro-CT上未恢复。由于组织学和micro-CT终点在不同骨骼部位评估，结构解释应谨慎。这些发现支持进一步评估EGT作为膳食补充剂，并需进行后续机制和剂量优化研究。

papers.title: CRISPR interference functional genomics of coding and non-coding determinants of Bacillus subtilis biofilms
papers.translated_title: CRISPR干扰功能基因组学：枯草芽孢杆菌生物膜编码与非编码决定因子
papers.author: Barras, H. H.
papers.summary: The architecture of Bacillus subtilis biofilms is influenced by the coordinated regulation of cellular specialization, matrix assembly, and metabolism. B. subtilis can form different types of biofilm in diverse physical and chemical environments. Understanding the molecular mechanisms that drive biofilm heterogeneity and adaptation to different environmental niches is crucial for developing more effective strategies to control their formation. In this study, we developed a tightly dual-regulated CRISPR interference (CRISPRi) system and employed multi-scale imaging to investigate the functions of individual genes in two distinct biofilm models: the floating pellicle and the intricate, three-dimensionally structured macrocolony, which develop at the liquid-air and solid-air interfaces, respectively. Our findings validated the CRISPRi approach as a powerful method for studying biofilm development over extended periods and revealed that numerous small non-coding RNAs are involved in regulating biofilm growth dynamics and architecture. The CRISPRi approach was also applied to a pool of 507 genes and transcription units, including protein-coding genes and non-coding RNAs, to screen for cell fitness in these two biofilm models. We discovered that, while both biofilm forms rely on fundamental processes such as cell wall synthesis and nucleotide metabolism, they exhibit different genetic dependencies with regard to matrix composition, motility, and signaling. Exopolysaccharide production, motility, and chemotaxis are crucial for pellicle formation. In contrast, macrocolony development is influenced by {gamma}-polyglutamate synthesis and nutrient acquisition functions. Genes of unknown function were also identified to play a differentially important role in the two biofilm forms. Additionally, the CRISPRi screens revealed further non-coding RNAs regulating biofilm architecture and growth dynamics, adding to the existing layers of post-transcriptional control. Collectively, these results demonstrate that biofilm formation at different physical interfaces is governed by a combination of shared and unique genetic pathways tailored to the specific biofilm environment, thereby opening research avenues into the molecular mechanisms specific to the solid-air and liquid-air interfaces.
papers.translated_summary: 枯草芽孢杆菌生物被膜的结构受细胞特化、基质组装和代谢的协同调控影响。枯草芽孢杆菌能在不同物理化学环境中形成不同类型的生物被膜。理解驱动生物被膜异质性及其适应不同环境生态位的分子机制，对于开发更有效的生物被膜控制策略至关重要。本研究开发了紧密双调控的CRISPR干扰（CRISPRi）系统，并采用多尺度成像技术，在两种不同的生物被膜模型中研究单个基因的功能：漂浮菌膜（在气液界面形成）和复杂三维结构的大菌落（在气固界面形成）。研究结果验证了CRISPRi方法在长期研究生物被膜发育中的有效性，并揭示大量小非编码RNA参与调控生物被膜生长动态和结构。该CRISPRi方法还应用于包含507个基因和转录单元（包括蛋白编码基因和非编码RNA）的文库，以筛选这两种生物被膜模型中的细胞适应性。我们发现，尽管两种生物被膜形式均依赖细胞壁合成和核苷酸代谢等基础过程，但在基质组成、运动性和信号传导方面表现出不同的遗传依赖性。胞外多糖产生、运动性和趋化性对菌膜形成至关重要；而大菌落发育则受γ-聚谷氨酸合成和营养获取功能的影响。此外，还鉴定出功能未知的基因在两种生物被膜形式中发挥差异重要作用。CRISPRi筛选进一步揭示了调控生物被膜结构和生长动态的非编码RNA，丰富了现有的转录后调控层级。综上，这些结果表明不同物理界面上的生物被膜形成受共享和特异性遗传通路的共同调控，这些通路针对特定生物被膜环境进行优化，从而为研究气固界面和气液界面的分子机制开辟了新途径。

papers.title: Characterization of carbon metabolism in a highly adhesive bacterium Acinetobacter sp. Tol 5 capable of assimilating diverse hydrocarbons and aromatic compounds
papers.translated_title: 对一株能够同化多种烃类和芳香族化合物的高粘附性细菌——不动杆菌属（Acinetobacter sp.）Tol 5的碳代谢特征分析
papers.author: Inoue, S.
papers.summary: Sustainable bioproduction requires developing robust microbial chassis with broad metabolic versatility and suitability for industrial applications. Acinetobacter sp. Tol 5 is a highly adhesive bacterium capable of utilizing various hydrocarbons, making it a promising chassis candidate for immobilized whole-cell catalysis. In this study, we characterized the carbon metabolism of Tol 5 by reconstructing metabolic pathway maps from its genomic data and analyzing the transcriptomes of cells grown on ethanol, hexadecane, toluene, and phenol. Genomic analysis revealed that Tol 5 has limited capacity for sugar utilization but possesses a wide range of metabolic pathways for alkane and aromatic compounds, including five distinct aromatic degradation routes that expand the known metabolic diversity of the genus Acinetobacter. Transcriptome analysis identified the specific pathway genes induced in response to each carbon source and revealed substrate-dependent cross-regulation between aromatic degradation pathways. Gene disruption experiments further demonstrated that toluene dioxygenase facilitates rapid entry into exponential growth on phenol but reduces carbon assimilation efficiency, while phenol monooxygenase serves as the primary and indispensable route for phenol assimilation, revealing a different physiological role for toluene dioxygenase in Tol 5 compared with Pseudomonas putida strains. These findings provide a comprehensive view of the carbon metabolism of Tol 5 and highlight its potential as a microbial chassis for bioprocesses utilizing non-sugar feedstocks, while revealing new aspects of metabolic versatility in the genus Acinetobacter.
papers.translated_summary: 可持续生物生产需要开发具有广泛代谢多样性和工业应用适应性的稳健微生物底盘。Acinetobacter sp. Tol 5是一种高粘附性细菌，能够利用多种碳氢化合物，使其成为固定化全细胞催化的理想底盘候选菌株。本研究通过从基因组数据重建代谢通路图谱，并分析以乙醇、十六烷、甲苯和苯酚为碳源生长的细胞转录组，表征了Tol 5的碳代谢特征。基因组分析显示，Tol 5对糖类利用能力有限，但拥有广泛的烷烃和芳香族化合物代谢途径，包括五种不同的芳香族降解途径，拓展了不动杆菌属已知的代谢多样性。转录组分析鉴定出每种碳源诱导的特异性途径基因，并揭示了芳香族降解途径之间底物依赖的交叉调控。基因敲除实验进一步表明，甲苯双加氧酶可促进苯酚上的快速指数生长，但降低了碳同化效率，而苯酚单加氧酶是苯酚同化的主要且不可或缺的途径，揭示了Tol 5中甲苯双加氧酶与恶臭假单胞菌菌株不同的生理作用。这些发现为Tol 5的碳代谢提供了全面视角，凸显其作为利用非糖原料生物工艺微生物底盘的潜力，同时揭示了不动杆菌属代谢多样性的新特征。

papers.title: Assessing Corynebacterium glutamicum as a surrogate of Mycobacterium tuberculosis for DNA gyrase inhibitor design.
papers.translated_title: 评估谷氨酸棒杆菌作为结核分枝杆菌替代物用于DNA旋转酶抑制剂设计。
papers.author: Wormser, Y.
papers.summary: DNA gyrase is an essential bacterial enzyme and a clinically validated target for the treatment of tuberculosis. However, the discovery of new inhibitors remains limited by the many challenges regarding the manipulation on pathogenic mycobacteria. This study validates Corynebacterium glutamicum (Cglu) as a safe, non-pathogenic surrogate for Mycobacterium tuberculosis (Mtb) to investigate DNA gyrase and facilitate the identification of new inhibitors. Using Cglu as a target allows for fast whole-cell screening under safe conditions while ensuring efficient drug uptake. Cglu shares key physiological features with Mtb, including genome size, complex cell wall structure, and a single type I and type II topoisomerase. Structural and functional comparisons emphasize the similarity of Cglu and Mtb gyrases, which share 70% sequence identity and show comparable catalytic properties and responsiveness to known inhibitors. Thus, the cryo-EM structure of the Cglu gyrase-DNA complex at 3.2 [A] resolution reveals highly conserved drug-binding pockets for known anti-gyrase inhibitors and the genetic depletion of gyrA or gyrB in Cglu causes severe growth and morphological defects, mirroring the effects of chemical inhibition and allowing to link gyrase function to cellular phenotypes. Comparative imaging of different inhibitor classes (fluoroquinolones, aminocoumarins, NBTIs) uncovers distinct morphological signatures that reflect the mode of action of each compound. Finally, cross-species complementation confirms functional conservation but also highlights subtle structural differences affecting efficiency. Together, these findings establish Cglu as a robust and biosafe model for dissecting gyrase function, visualizing DNA topology dynamics, and accelerating the discovery of gyrase-targeting antimicrobials. More generally, our studies demonstrate the feasibility of using Cglu as a cell-based screening platform to discover new anti-tuberculous compounds targeting conserved mechanisms, not only for validated TB drug targets such as DNA gyrase but also for new, yet to be identified, targets.
papers.translated_summary: DNA旋转酶是一种必需的细菌酶，也是结核病临床验证的治疗靶点。然而，由于对致病性分枝杆菌的操作存在诸多挑战，新型抑制剂的发现仍受到限制。本研究验证了谷氨酸棒杆菌（Cglu）可作为结核分枝杆菌（Mtb）的安全、非致病性替代模型，用于研究DNA旋转酶并促进新型抑制剂的发现。使用Cglu作为靶标可在安全条件下实现快速全细胞筛选，同时确保药物高效摄取。Cglu与Mtb共享关键生理特征，包括基因组大小、复杂细胞壁结构以及单一I型和II型拓扑异构酶。结构和功能比较强调了Cglu与Mtb旋转酶的相似性，两者序列一致性达70%，并表现出相当的催化特性和对已知抑制剂的响应能力。因此，Cglu旋转酶-DNA复合物的冷冻电镜结构（分辨率3.2 [A]）揭示了已知抗旋转酶抑制剂的保守药物结合口袋，而Cglu中gyrA或gyrB的基因缺失会导致严重的生长和形态缺陷，这与化学抑制的效果一致，并可将旋转酶功能与细胞表型联系起来。对不同抑制剂类别（氟喹诺酮类、氨基香豆素类、NBTIs）的比较成像揭示了反映每种化合物作用模式的独特形态特征。最后，跨物种互补实验证实了功能保守性，但也突出了影响效率的细微结构差异。这些发现共同确立了Cglu作为稳健且生物安全的模型，用于解析旋转酶功能、可视化DNA拓扑动力学，并加速靶向旋转酶的抗菌药物发现。更广泛而言，我们的研究证明了利用Cglu作为基于细胞的筛选平台来发现靶向保守机制的新型抗结核化合物的可行性，这不仅适用于已验证的结核病药物靶点（如DNA旋转酶），也适用于尚未鉴定的新靶点。

papers.title: Development and Evaluation of a PCR Test System for the Detection of Salmonella spp. in Clinical and Epidemiological Materials
papers.translated_title: PCR检测系统的开发与评估：用于临床和流行病学样本中沙门氏菌属的检测
papers.author: Yessimseit, D.
papers.summary: Background: Reliable detection of Salmonella remains a major challenge for public health surveillance and food safety due to the growing diversity of circulating serovars and the limitations of existing molecular targets. This study aimed to identify an optimal molecular target and develop a TaqMan real-time PCR assay for the detection of Salmonella spp. Methods: Based on the results screening for Salmonella genes suitability as molecular markers, a TaqMan real-time PCR assay targeting the hilA gene was developed and validated. Analytical sensitivity, analytical specificity, and performance on bacterial isolates and artificially contaminated food samples were assessed. Results: Among all candidate targets, hilA demonstrated the broadest coverage and was detected in all tested Salmonella isolates, including representatives of rare serological groups, whereas invA conventionally used for this pathogen detection, was absent in a subset of strains. The assay exhibited a limit of detection of 100 bacterial cells/mL and 100 fgL of genomic DNA. No cross-reactivity was observed with DNA from Shigella flexneri, Shigella sonnei, Yersinia pestis, Y. pseudotuberculosis, Y. enterocolitica, Y. kristensenii, Bacillus anthracis, Vibrio cholerae, or Francisella tularensis. The assay successfully detected Salmonella DNA in all artificially contaminated food samples tested. Evaluation using a collection of 25 bacterial isolates demonstrated positive amplification in all 24 confirmed Salmonella strains, while a strain initially identified by conventional bacteriology as Salmonella but subsequently confirmed by whole-genome sequencing as Proteus mirabilis yielded a negative result. Conclusions. The hilA gene represents a highly conserved and reliable molecular target for the detection of Salmonella spp. The developed TaqMan real-time PCR assay demonstrated high analytical sensitivity, excellent specificity, and broad serovar coverage, supporting its application in laboratory detection of Salmonella, food safety monitoring, and epidemiological surveillance.
papers.translated_summary: 背景：由于流行血清型多样性增加及现有分子靶标的局限性，沙门氏菌的可靠检测仍是公共卫生监测和食品安全领域的重大挑战。本研究旨在筛选最优分子靶标，并建立用于检测沙门氏菌属的TaqMan实时荧光PCR方法。方法：通过筛选沙门氏菌基因作为分子标记的适用性，开发并验证了靶向hilA基因的TaqMan实时荧光PCR检测方法。评估了该方法的分析灵敏度、分析特异性，以及在细菌分离株和人工污染食品样本中的检测性能。结果：在所有候选靶标中，hilA基因覆盖范围最广，可检测所有受试沙门氏菌分离株（包括罕见血清群代表菌株），而传统用于该病原体检测的invA基因在部分菌株中缺失。该方法的检测限为100个细菌细胞/mL和100 fg基因组DNA。与福氏志贺菌、宋内志贺菌、鼠疫耶尔森菌、假结核耶尔森菌、小肠结肠炎耶尔森菌、克氏耶尔森菌、炭疽芽孢杆菌、霍乱弧菌及土拉弗朗西斯菌DNA均无交叉反应。该方法成功检测出所有人工污染食品样本中的沙门氏菌DNA。对25株细菌分离株的评估显示，24株经确认的沙门氏菌均呈阳性扩增，而1株经传统细菌学鉴定为沙门氏菌但后续全基因组测序确认为奇异变形杆菌的菌株呈阴性结果。结论：hilA基因是检测沙门氏菌属高度保守且可靠的分子靶标。所建立的TaqMan实时荧光PCR方法具有高分析灵敏度、优异特异性和广泛血清型覆盖范围，可支持其在沙门氏菌实验室检测、食品安全监测和流行病学监测中的应用。

papers.title: Assessing the influence of edge effects on macrofaunal contributions to decomposition rates across forest-field ecotones.
papers.translated_title: 评估边缘效应对森林-田野交错带大型动物分解速率贡献的影响。
papers.author: Niles, T. E.
papers.summary: Understanding the relationships between soil macrofauna and decomposition is crucial for predicting how land-use change impacts ecosystem function in fragmented systems. This is because soil macrofauna affect decomposition and also respond to the changes in abiotic conditions across habitat gradients. This study investigates edge effects on the macrofauna contributions to decomposition across forest-field ecotones. We used bait lamina assay to quantify aboveground and belowground feeding activity of soil macrofauna in Autumn 2025 in three deciduous forest-old field ecotones and one coniferous forest-old field ecotone, in Southwestern Ontario, Canada. Vegetation diversity and composition, LAI and soil characteristics (i.e., soil organic matter, pH, temperature and moisture) were measured at each plot along the ecotone. Pitfall trap data collected in Summer 2025 at the same sites were used to characterize macrofauna communities. We used generalized linear mixed effects models to estimate the effect of distance to edge, site, and depth into the soil on bait lamina consumption and soil macrofauna, with transect nested within site as random effects. Consumption activity increased with distance into the forest from the field, with the edge representing an intermediate; and, decreased with increasing depth into the soil. In contrast, soil macrofauna abundance, especially isopods, decrease with distance into the forest from the field. These trends varied significantly across sites, so that consumption activity and abundance sometimes remained constant across the ecotone (i.e., site x distance interaction). The results demonstrate that macrofaunal contributions to bait consumption varied along the ecotone, shaped by interacting environmental gradients and shifts in community composition unique to each site.
papers.translated_summary: 理解土壤大型动物与分解之间的关系，对于预测土地利用变化如何影响破碎化生态系统中的功能至关重要。这是因为土壤大型动物既影响分解过程，又对栖息地梯度上非生物条件的变化做出响应。本研究调查了森林-农田交错带中边缘效应对大型动物分解贡献的影响。我们于2025年秋季在加拿大安大略省西南部的三处落叶林-旧农田交错带和一处针叶林-旧农田交错带，使用诱饵薄片法量化了土壤大型动物的地上和地下取食活动。沿交错带每个样地测量了植被多样性、组成、叶面积指数及土壤特征（即土壤有机质、pH值、温度和湿度）。利用2025年夏季在同一地点收集的陷阱法数据来表征大型动物群落。我们采用广义线性混合效应模型，以样地内嵌套的样线作为随机效应，评估了距边缘距离、样地和土壤深度对诱饵薄片消耗量及土壤大型动物的影响。从农田向森林内部，消耗活动随距离增加而增强，边缘区域表现为中间状态；同时消耗活动随土壤深度增加而减弱。相反，土壤大型动物丰度（尤其是等足类动物）从农田向森林内部随距离增加而减少。这些趋势在不同样地间存在显著差异，因此消耗活动和丰度有时在交错带上保持恒定（即样地与距离的交互作用）。结果表明，大型动物对诱饵消耗的贡献沿交错带变化，这种变化受每个样地特有的环境梯度相互作用和群落组成变化的影响。

papers.title: Individual-level traits outweigh neighborhood and landscape level factors for frugivorous insect parasites in small forest patches
papers.translated_title: 在小型森林斑块中，个体层面的特征对食果昆虫寄生虫的影响超过邻域和景观层面的因素。
papers.author: Back, T. C.
papers.summary: Frugivorous insect larvae are dependent on fruiting plants for development, leading to complex host-parasite interactions that may be influenced by many factors at various scales. We compared the relative effects of factors at the individual, neighborhood, and landscape scales in forest patches. Our results suggest that in areas like upstate New York, where agricultural land uses are dominant, individual scale factors are the most influential. Specifically, parasitism increased with host fruit crop size, but was not associated with host species richness or proximity to forest edge. Notably, the most parasitized hosts were non-native species, including Frangula alnus Mill. (Glossy Buckthorn), indicating a potential role of invasive species to shape host-parasite interactions in our system. Our results underscore the importance of host-specific traits in structuring parasitism patterns and suggest management could consider both the ecological context of host traits and the influence of invasive species at multiple scales.
papers.translated_summary: 以果实为食的昆虫幼虫依赖结果植物完成发育，由此形成复杂的寄主-寄生虫互作关系，这种关系可能受到多尺度多种因素的影响。我们比较了森林斑块中个体尺度、邻域尺度和景观尺度因子的相对影响。研究结果表明，在纽约州北部等农业用地占主导地位的地区，个体尺度因子影响最为显著。具体而言，寄生虫感染率随寄主果实产量增加而升高，但与寄主物种丰富度或距森林边缘距离无关。值得注意的是，感染率最高的寄主为非本地物种，包括欧鼠李（Frangula alnus Mill.），这表明入侵物种可能在本系统寄主-寄生虫互作中发挥塑造作用。研究结果强调了寄主特异性特征在构建寄生虫感染模式中的重要性，并提示管理措施应同时考虑寄主特征的生态背景以及入侵物种在多尺度上的影响。

papers.title: Intra-African Geographic Domain Shift in Wildlife Camera Trap Species Classification: A Comparative Study of Supervised and Zero-Shot Foundation Models
papers.translated_title: 非洲内部野生动物相机陷阱物种分类中的地理域偏移：监督学习与零样本基础模型的比较研究
papers.author: Nanduri, N.
papers.summary: Camera trap networks such as Snapshot Safari have generated millions of labelled wildlife images across Africa, enabling the training of deep learning models for automated species classification. However, deploying models trained in one African region to another remains poorly understood. To the best of our knowledge, this study presents the first systematic evaluation of geographic domain shift within the African continent for wildlife camera trap species classification, using the Machine Learning sub-field of Artificial Intelligence. We use three model architectures, each interacting with Snapshot Serengeti in a different way: BEiTV2is fine-tuned on Serengeti images as a supervised baseline; DINOv2 with FAISS uses Serengeti images as a retrieval index without any weight updates; and BioCLIP is a true zero-shot foundation model that receives no Serengeti training data at all. All three are then evaluated on two Southern African test sets, Snapshot Kgalagadi and Snapshot Kruger, as well as on locally collected wildlife photographs from Botswana. We conduct eight experiments covering in-domain baselines, cross-dataset transfer, data scaling, MegaDetector preprocessing, grayscale vs. colour image conditions, and per-species transfer analysis. This work provides the first empirical characterisation of intra-African domain shift across both supervised and zero-shot architectures, and offers practical guidance for conservation AI practitioners who need to deploy models across the diverse ecosystems of Southern Africa without collecting new labelled data.
papers.translated_summary: 诸如Snapshot Safari等相机陷阱网络已在非洲各地生成了数百万张带标签的野生动物图像，使得训练用于自动物种分类的深度学习模型成为可能。然而，将在一个非洲地区训练的模型部署到另一个地区仍存在认知不足。据我们所知，本研究首次利用人工智能领域的机器学习分支，系统评估了非洲大陆内野生动物相机陷阱物种分类的地理域偏移问题。我们采用三种模型架构，每种架构以不同方式与Snapshot Serengeti交互：BEiTV2作为监督基线在Serengeti图像上微调；DINOv2结合FAISS将Serengeti图像作为检索索引而不更新权重；BioCLIP则是完全零样本的基础模型，完全不接收Serengeti训练数据。随后，所有模型在南部非洲的两个测试集（Snapshot Kgalagadi和Snapshot Kruger）以及博茨瓦纳本地收集的野生动物照片上进行评估。我们开展了八项实验，涵盖域内基线、跨数据集迁移、数据缩放、MegaDetector预处理、灰度与彩色图像条件对比，以及逐物种迁移分析。本研究首次对非洲大陆内监督与零样本架构的域偏移进行了实证描述，并为需要在南部非洲多样化生态系统中部署模型且无需收集新标注数据的保护AI从业者提供了实用指导。
